title: Monday.com Focuses on Artificial Intelligence Strategy with 630 Employees
excerpt: Israeli software company Monday.com recently announced that it will cut about 20% of its staff, affecting approximately 630 employees. This layoff decision is p
content_html:
Israeli software company Monday.com recently announced that it will cut about 20% of its staff, affecting approximately 630 employees. This layoff decision is part of the company's restructuring plan, aimed at supporting a more streamlined and focused operational model while increasing investment in artificial intelligence projects.

Earlier this year, Monday.com decided to make its AI platform a core product, significantly adjusting it and reshaping the entire product to meet the needs of enterprise customers for AI assistants. The AI work platform currently includes features such as a no-code app builder, custom AI assistants, workflow automation tools, and chatbots that can generate reports and update dashboards.

Monday.com's decision to lay off employees is not an isolated case; many large technology companies are also undergoing large-scale layoffs to increase their investments in artificial intelligence. According to data from Layoffs.fyi, the number of tech layoffs in May 2026 reached a multi-year high, with over 78% of companies reporting layoffs due to the need to refocus on artificial intelligence. So far in 2026, more than 122,000 tech jobs have been cut.

Due to the restructuring, Monday.com expects to incur related costs between $45 million and $55 million. The company hopes that this adjustment will give it a greater competitive advantage in the future market.

Key Points:

🌟 Monday.com is laying off 630 employees to streamline operations and focus on artificial intelligence.

🤖 The company has reshaped its products, launching an AI work platform that includes a no-code app builder and AI assistants.

📉 The number of tech industry layoffs in 2026 has exceeded 122,000, reflecting a strong demand for investment in AI.

content_html_zh:
以色列软件公司Monday.com最近宣布将裁员约20%，影响约630名员工。 此次裁员决定是公司重组计划的一部分，旨在支持更加精简和专注的运营模式，同时增加对人工智能项目的投资。

今年早些时候，Monday.com决定将其AI平台作为核心产品，对其进行大幅调整，重塑整个产品，以满足企业客户对AI助手的需求。 人工智能工作平台目前包括无代码应用程序构建器、自定义人工智能助手、工作流程自动化工具以及可以生成报告和更新仪表板的聊天机器人等功能。

Monday.com 裁员的决定并非孤例。许多大型科技公司也正在进行大规模裁员，以增加对人工智能的投资。 Layoffs.fyi 的数据显示，2026 年 5 月科技公司裁员数量达到多年来新高，超过 78% 的公司报告因需要重新专注于人工智能而裁员。 截至 2026 年，科技岗位已被裁减超过 122,000 个。

由于重组，Monday.com 预计将产生 4500 万至 5500 万美元的相关成本。 公司希望此次调整能够使其在未来的市场中获得更大的竞争优势。

要点：

🌟 Monday.com 将裁员 630 名员工，以精简运营并专注于人工智能。

🤖 该公司重塑了其产品，推出了一个人工智能工作平台，其中包括无代码应用程序构建器和人工智能助手。

📉 2026年科技行业裁员人数已超过12.2万人，反映出人工智能投资的强劲需求。
